summary: Iteration 21: Image CDN Architecture & Variant Categorization Testing Complete. 20/21 backend tests pass (1 skipped). Verified IMAGE_BASE_URL/IMAGE_CDN_BASE env var resolution, cache headers on /api/uploads, image category tagging in POST /api/auctions and /api/auctions/import-mobile-bg, AuctionCard lazy-load behavior, and pickOrderedPreviewSlides ordering logic.

issues: Same auction appears twice in 'Featured Listings' section - React key warning in console. This is a display issue, not a data issue (API returns 1 auction).

critical_code_review_comments: Backend public_variant_url() correctly implements IMAGE_BASE_URL → IMAGE_CDN_BASE → relative /api/uploads fallback chain
CachedStaticFiles subclass correctly sets Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable for variants/* paths
CachedStaticFiles correctly sets Cache-Control: public, max-age=604800 for non-variants paths
POST /api/auctions correctly tags images with categories: first exterior=main, rest exterior=exterior, bumper/wheels=detail, interior=interior
POST /api/auctions with uncategorized images correctly tags: first=main, rest=other
AuctionCard.jsx pickOrderedPreviewSlides correctly orders: main → exterior → interior × 2, with fallback to remaining unused images
AuctionCard.jsx lazy-load working: 3 placeholder divs before hover → 0 after hover, 1 picture → 4 pictures
AuctionCard.jsx pagination dots count matches slides (5 dots = 4 photos + 1 CTA)
CTA slide shows 'View full auction' with 'TAP TO OPEN' text
Legacy auctions without images_variants gracefully fall back to images[] array
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test auction 4071d037-1036-443d-8456-9a27880c4291 with categorized images_variants for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 validated the image CDN architecture updates. Key findings: (1) IMAGE_BASE_URL takes priority over IMAGE_CDN_BASE, both fall back to relative /api/uploads when empty. (2) Cache headers verified via direct curl to localhost:8001 - variants get immutable 1-year cache, non-variants get 7-day cache. (3) Category tagging logic verified for both categorized bucket uploads and uncategorized uploads. (4) Mobile.bg import correctly tags first image as 'main', rest as 'exterior'. (5) Frontend AuctionCard lazy-load verified: 3 placeholder divs before hover, 0 after hover (replaced with <picture> elements). (6) Pagination dots count = 5 (4 photos + 1 CTA). (7) CTA slide shows 'View full auction' text. (8) Legacy auctions without images_variants still render via fallback to images[] array.

image_base_url_resolution.details: IMAGE_BASE_URL → IMAGE_CDN_BASE → relative /api/uploads fallback chain works correctly

cache_headers_variants.details: variants/* paths return Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

cache_headers_non_variants.details: non-variants paths return Cache-Control: public, max-age=604800

category_tagging_categorized_upload.details: first exterior=main, rest exterior=exterior, bumper/wheels=detail, interior=interior

auction_card_lazy_load.details: 3 placeholder divs before hover → 0 after hover, 1 picture → 4 pictures

auction_card_cta_slide.details: CTA slide shows 'View full auction' with 'TAP TO OPEN'

legacy_auction_fallback.details: Auctions without images_variants fall back to images[] array

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all tests use real endpoints
